params.SpellDescription: The next time you would draw a card this turn, instead look at the top X cards of your library, put all but one of them on the bottom of your library in a random order, then draw a card. X can't be 0.
params.Name: Aladdin's Wish

remaining_params.SpellDescription: The next time you would draw a card this turn, instead look at the top X cards of your library, put all but one of them on the bottom of your library in a random order, then draw a card. X can't be 0.
remaining_params.Name: Aladdin's Wish
